title: Native methods should be wrapped
description: Native methods should be wrappedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellpitfallWhy is this an issue?Native methods are functions that reside in libraries outside the .NET runtime. Calling them is helpful for interoperability with applications and libraries written in other programming languages, mainly when performing platform-specific operations. However, doing so comes with additional risks since it means stepping out of the memory-safety model of the runtime.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.description: Check for public native methods with DllImport that should be wrapped with private visibility
